title: Illumination
description: Illumination adds an enchantment that brightens the player's helmet.
body: # Illumination Illumination adds an enchantment that subtly brightens the player's helmet, illuminating their surroundings and offering improved visibility in dark environments. Never be left in the dark again! [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Join%20our%20Discord-%235865F2.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/wgSCCaQN5W) ![Illumination Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eVpI7fHt/images/1090d11d54cb684515105e0e6cb91ea09ea50358.webp) ![Illumination Enchantment on Helmet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eVpI7fHt/images/aa71f19c5de2823c10e9dd0bf72b65834509e9b0.png) ## Installation ### Datapack 1. Download the Datapack. 2. Copy the .zip file into the datapacks folder which is located under `%APPDATA%\.minecraft\saves\\datapacks` (under Windows). Replace correspondingly. 3. Reload the World or run the `/reload` command. ### Mod 1. Download the Mod. 2. Copy the downloaded `.jar` file into the mods folder which is located under `%APPDATA%\.minecraft\mods` (under Windows). 3. Reload the World or run the `/reload` command. ## Bug Reports and Feature Requests If you found bugs or need support, contact us by joining [our discord server](https://discord.gg/wgSCCaQN5W).
